name: tree-view
title: Tree View
description: Generic, recursive collapsible tree of nodes. The flexible primitive beneath file-tree, json-tree-view, and any agent-state / org-chart / call-graph surface.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Build a Node literal where Children make the node a branch. WithExpandedDepth(n) opens n levels; WithExpandAll opens everything; WithCollapseAll closes everything. WithRootVisible(false) hides the root so its direct children render at depth 0. Right/l expands a branch, Left/h collapses or jumps to the parent, Enter toggles a branch and emits SelectMsg, Space toggles without emitting. SelectMsg carries the Node, its slash-joined index path, and the cursor index.
